subcodes.first_line: O Divine Herald! If thou couldst but fathom the state in which I am engaged in remembrance of thee, surely thy tongue would be moved to divine thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی اگر بدانی که در چه حالتی بیاد تو مشغولم البته زبان بشکرانه الهی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @pain of love; love as veil, @consolation and comfort
